title: satureja cymuligera
intro: Satureja cymuligera, also known as Yemeni savory, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory infections, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Satureja cymuligera include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, and support digestion. Satureja cymuligera can be prepared as an herbal tea by infusing its leaves in hot water, or used as a topical ointment to soothe skin irritations.
